narrative.headline: ⚠ 780 security findings — review before other cleanup. All T1 items cleared!

actions.description: 66 flat_dirs findings — create subdirectories and use `desloppify move`
174 coupling findings — fix boundary violations with `desloppify move`
18 cycles findings — break cycles by extracting shared code or using `desloppify move`
1256 facade findings — flatten re-export facades or consolidate barrel files
8 uncalled_functions findings — remove dead functions or document why they're retained
4137 structural findings — decompose large files — extract logic into focused modules
54 props findings — split bloated components, extract sub-components
6651 dupes findings — extract shared utility or consolidate duplicates
1766 dict_keys findings — fix dict key mismatches — dead writes are likely dead code, schema drift suggests a typo or missed rename
10196 test_coverage findings — add tests for untested production modules — prioritize by import count
425 responsibility_cohesion findings — split modules with too many responsibilities — extract focused sub-modules
455 unused findings — inspect with `desloppify next` and fix manually
2301 smells findings — inspect with `desloppify next` and fix manually
224 global_mutable_config findings — refactor module-level mutable state — use explicit init functions or dependency injection
72 private_imports findings — stop importing private symbols across module boundaries
780 security findings — review and fix security findings — prioritize by severity
